current_baseline.latest_accepted_milestone: Provider Runtime Resource Lifecycle Design v1
current_baseline.latest_main_merge_snapshot: no additional main snapshot by policy
current_baseline.prior_accepted_milestone: Weekly Coach Summary QA Data Context Integration v1

active_roadmap.current_authorized_milestone: Weekly Coach Summary Provider Runtime Design v1
active_roadmap.current_authorized_scope: Design qwen2.5:3b Weekly Coach Summary provider input/output/parser/validator/fallback/persistence/lifecycle contract without runtime execution.
active_roadmap.recommended_next_milestone_after_accepta: Weekly Coach Summary Provider Runtime Prototype v1 - Developer Mode Only

active_roadmap.required_prerequisite_commit: be2f321 Add provider runtime resource lifecycle policy

linux: Linux runtime uses Windows Ollama over LAN

commands.app: Windows PowerShell command that talks to Linux over SSH and restarts FastAPI + Streamlit there
commands.lstop: Windows PowerShell command that sends LF-normalized Linux command text over SSH and stops Linux FastAPI + Streamlit
commands.lrestart: Windows PowerShell command that talks to Linux over SSH and restarts Linux FastAPI + Streamlit

model_provider_policy.qwen3_32b: research / future premium async candidate only
model_provider_policy.model_promotion: No model promoted without Architecture approval.
model_provider_policy.boundary: Backend owns truth; provider proposes language; validator decides display safety.
model_provider_policy.weekly_coach_summary_future_provider_des: direct_ollama + qwen2.5:3b + strict JSON schema + validator + deterministic fallback; design only until accepted.
model_provider_policy.weekly_coach_summary_provider_execution: not authorized in Weekly Coach Summary Provider Runtime Design v1

daily_coach_async_boundary.current: Weekly Coach Summary Async Service Shell / No Worker v1 generates deterministic ApprovedWeeklyCoachSummary output from bounded fixture inputs. It is no-worker and does not persist, call providers, or touch UI.
daily_coach_async_boundary.normal_today_behavior: unchanged; no Streamlit UI, API, provider runtime, persistence schema, automatic generation, or public/default display added
in_current_scope: deterministic Weekly Coach Summary candidate generation
deferred: Weekly Coach Summary persistence design/schema/service shell
Weekly Coach Summary Developer Mode inspection
Weekly Coach Summary provider runtime, if later authorized
not_authorized: provider runtime for Weekly Coach Summary
daily_coach_async_boundary.recommended_first_milestone: Weekly Coach Summary Async Service Shell / No Worker v1
daily_coach_async_boundary.lstop_crlf_hotfix: implemented in scripts/fitness_commands.ps1 by LF-normalizing SSH command script content and transporting it as UTF-8/base64 before remote bash execution
daily_coach_async_boundary.weekly_coach_summary_posture: deterministic service shell; provider runtime deferred; persistence schema deferred; Developer Mode inspection later

codex_assisted_flow.backend_user_role: review, validate, stage explicit files, commit, push, snapshot, Linux pull, and hand off to Architecture after Codex finishes
codex_assisted_flow.default: chat-driven Backend implementation using apply scripts/patches

workflow_rules.feature_flow: commit -> push -> snapshot -> Linux pull feature
workflow_rules.main_flow: merge -> validate -> push -> snapshot -> Linux pull main

definition_of_done: project memory updated when behavior, architecture, tests, UI, provider behavior, persistence, routing, runtime commands, or accepted status changes

weekly_coach_summary.root_cause: Streamlit full-app rerun behavior during Developer Mode button interactions
weekly_coach_summary.fix: Weekly Coach Summary Developer Mode panel uses Streamlit fragment reruns when available and shows Developer Mode-only timing diagnostics.

provider_lifecycle.manual_unload: named-model only via Ollama API; no broad process kill
backlog: Daily Narrative Provider Quality + Grounding v1
